title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 135.262 - Any area meeting enterprise zone requirements shall be designated as such
text:
135.262.  Any area meeting enterprise zone requirements shall be designated as such. — In addition to the number of enterprise zones authorized under the provisions of sections 135.206 to 135.260, the department of economic development shall designate any area that meets all the requirements of section 135.205 as an enterprise zone.
(L. 2004 S.B. 1155)
